sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19057" key="baqu/pelmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθύ-πελμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πέλμα</etym>) <sense id="n19057.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thick-soled,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εὔμαρις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.413</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
